title: PREVENTION AND RECOVERY TREATMENT SERVICES - 211info
text: LIFEWAYS INC PREVENTION AND RECOVERY TREATMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides inpatient and outpatient substance use disorder treatment services, including assessment and individual and group treatment/education. If needed, services are coordinated with the local court system, SAFE Court, and Community Corrections to fulfill legal obligations. Other services include domestic violence intervention services, moral reconation groups, anger management, dual diagnosis treatment, and urinalysis and other screening tools. Substance use disorder prevention education available for children, parents, and community members. Also provides gambling assessment and treatment. 702 Sunset Drive Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Assessment walk-in hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-3pm Office: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm, evening services available Email (541) 889-9167 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 889-9167 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in for initial assessment. Call for information on prevention education. FEES: Substance use disorder services: Accepts most private insurance, sliding scale fees available Gambling services: None DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Malheur County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Education/Prevention Anger Management Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Domestic Violence Intervention Programs Drug Use Disorder Education/Prevention Gambling Disorder Counseling Inpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities Integrated Co-Occurring Disorders Treatment Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - PEER SUPPORT CENTER MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COMMUNITY SUPPORT SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TREASURE VALLEY REGION MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWAYS INC
